benefits.title: Why Telederm for Your Company?
benefits.description: Healthy employees are happy employees. With Telederm, you invest in your team's wellbeing.

health.title: Promote Employee Health
health.description: Fast access to specialists means faster diagnosis and treatment. Skin problems are detected and treated early.

productivity.title: Increase Productivity
productivity.description: Fewer doctor visits during work hours. Employees can conduct consultations flexibly from home or on the go.

employer.title: Strengthen Employer Brand
employer.description: Position yourself as a modern, health-conscious employer and win in the competition for the best talent.

costs.title: Reduce Costs
costs.description: Reduce indirect costs from production losses and absenteeism. Prevention is cheaper than treatment.

simple.title: Easy Integration
simple.description: Seamless integration into your existing health management. We take care of everything – from setup to employee communication.

data.title: Anonymous Reports
data.description: Receive anonymized reports on usage and health trends without seeing personal data.

howItWorks.description: Three simple steps to skin health for your team

step3.description: Your employees get access to the Telederm platform and can immediately receive professional skin consultations.

t1.name: Sabine K.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Answers to the most important questions about our corporate offering

q1.question: How quickly can we start?
q1.answer: After signing the contract, we can go live within 2-3 weeks. We handle the complete setup and support you with internal communication.

q2.question: Is there a minimum number of employees?
q2.answer: Our Starter package is available from 50 employees. For smaller companies, we offer individual solutions – just contact us.

q3.question: How is data protection handled?
q3.answer: All medical data is strictly confidential and stored in GDPR compliance. As an employer, you only receive anonymized, aggregated usage data.

q4.question: Can employees include family members?
q4.answer: Yes, for a small additional fee, employees can include their partners and children in the service.

q5.question: Which skin conditions are treated?
q5.answer: Our dermatologists treat the full spectrum of dermatology: from acne and eczema to occupational skin diseases and skin cancer screening.

q6.question: How does billing work?
q6.answer: Billing is monthly based on active employees. You receive a clear invoice and detailed usage statistics.

contact.title: Let's Talk
